messages.content:
Now I'll analyze the PDF lab report from the provided URL. Based on the report content extracted from `Document_1.pdf` and applying the BloomCell clinical framework with the 4-step diagnostic logic, here is the structured analysis:







✅ PatientDocument `53dd6968-638a-42dc-b602-8fc42f82f389` has been successfully updated with `highlightData` in Cosmos DB.

traceEvents.toolResult: Starting execution — loading execution-trace skill first

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "I need to load the report-analyzer skill to understand how to analyze the lab PDF and produce structured highlightData output.",
  "expected_outcome": "Skill instructions detailing how to parse and analyze the lab report PDF and produce skillOutputItems in JSON format.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "Loaded report-analyzer skill. It requires analyzing a PDF lab report and producing exactly 8 JSON objects (4 points × 2 each) covering Internal Notes, Understanding Your Results, Priority Actions, and Long-Term Strategy.",
  "insight": "Now I must download and analyze the PDF from doumentupload_url, then produce the structured highlightData JSON array.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "Downloading and analyzing the PDF from https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584216291929108164Document_1.pdf to extract lab values and apply BloomCell 4-step analysis.",
  "expected_outcome": "A valid JSON array of 8 structured objects representing the lab report analysis.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "PDF analyzed. Key out-of-range biomarkers identified across metabolic, thyroid, liver, and deficiency categories. 4 unique markers selected for highlight fields across the 4 groups with no overlap.",
  "insight": "skillOutputItems produced as 8-object JSON array. Ready to merge into original payload and update Cosmos DB.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 3,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "reasoning": "Merging the original payload with highlightData (flat array of 8 objects) and calling cosmos_update_document with id=53dd6968-638a-42dc-b602-8fc42f82f389 and partitionKey=PatientDocument.",
  "expected_outcome": "Cosmos DB document successfully updated with highlightData populated.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 4,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "result_summary": "Cosmos DB document 53dd6968-638a-42dc-b602-8fc42f82f389 updated successfully with 8 highlightData objects. Status 200 returned.",
  "insight": "All 4 analysis groups populated correctly with unique markers: HbA1c (Internal Notes), Vitamin D (Understanding Your Results), Ferritin (Priority Actions), CRP (Long-Term Strategy). No overlaps. Update confirmed.",
  "status": "success"
}
